blended.narrative: Tremblant is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.5 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 3,208 ft. Looking ahead, 17 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tuesday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 49°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.9" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 5" of snow, highs of 22°F. Expect powder.
